options.content:
# Juddges — Celery — not yet wired up

**Blocked:** No Celery/broker metrics are exported (no celery-exporter, no Flower-to-Prometheus bridge).

### Intended tiles
- Queue depth per queue
- Task duration histogram by task name
- Failure rate / retry rate

### What it needs
Stand up celery-exporter (or scrape Redis broker length) into Prometheus, then wire panels to it. Follow-up to #196.

_This placeholder is committed so the dashboard set is complete and reviewable; it renders cleanly (text only) and carries no panels that would error against a datasource that does not exist yet._
